name: Adult cut
description: The chair-worthy standard: consultation first, clipper-and-shear precision after. We balance your growth pattern, line, and texture so the fade melts and the silhouette stays sharp — the cut people notice on the street before you say a word.

name: Kids Haircut
description: Patience, coaching, and a finish they’re proud to wear to school. We keep little ones at ease, move efficiently, and deliver clean lines without the drama — the shop parents recommend when “just a trim” has to look legendary.

name: Shape Up
description: Hairline rehab in minutes: crisp edges, sharp corners, and symmetry that frames your face. Perfect between full cuts when you need that fresh-from-the-shop look without sitting for a full service.

name: Shape Up & Beard
description: Top and bottom tuned together — hairline, cheek lines, mustache weight, and beard bulk balanced so the whole head reads as one design. It’s the “everything looks intentional” refresh.

name: Senior Citizens
description: Respectful pacing, steady hands, and classic barber attention — tailored for comfort without skimping on detail. Leave looking dignified, sharp, and ready for whatever the day holds.

name: Haircut & Beard
description: Full grooming in one session: haircut architecture plus beard sculpting so cheek lines, neckline, and length work with your face shape. Built for clients who want coordinated polish, not two half-finished looks.

name: Haircut / Beard / Hot Towel
description: The deluxe route — cut, beard, and a steamed towel finish that softens skin and elevates the whole appointment. It’s barbershop ritual meets modern precision; leave feeling reset, not just trimmed.

name: Enhancement beard color black/brown
description: Targeted color to blend patches, even tone, and sharpen the beard’s presence — applied with a light hand so it reads natural under daylight. We’ll match depth to your hair and skin so the enhancement whispers instead of shouts.

name: Braids
description: Neat sections, consistent tension, and a clean parting pattern built to last — whether you’re maintaining length or locking in a new style. Book the time your pattern deserves; walk out camera-ready.
